title: Irish Baguette Sandwich
description: A delicious and easy-to-make sandwich filled with tender corned beef, crunchy fresh vegetables, and creamy sauce.
instructions: 2. Slice the corned beef into thin strips.
3. Slice the baguette into 1-inch thick slices.
4. Shred the cabbage and chop the carrots.
5. In a bowl, mix the mayonnaise and chopped parsley.
6. Assemble the sandwiches by spreading the mayonnaise mixture on the bottom slice of the baguette, adding a few slices of corned beef, some shredded cabbage, and chopped carrots.
7. Top with the top slice of the baguette.
8. Bake the sandwiches in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the bread is toasted.
